# SANITIZED sample of a real OTT "A New Lead From Facebook Ads" email. The customer's
# name/email/phone are replaced with fake values; the layout + field labels are IDENTICAL
# to production (captured from a real message 2026-07-15). Used by tests/ott-email.test.js.
# Lines starting with '#' are stripped by the test before parsing.


________________________________
